supporting_evidence: Article 10 defines duplicate reimbursement as same invoice used multiple times
FPDEV900008 != FPDEV900009, different vendors, different employees
rationale: Article 10 explicitly states '同一发票最多报销1次'. The two records use different invoices (FPDEV900008 vs FPDEV900009). Even though date, amount, and expense type match, the policy basis for duplicate reimbursement requires the same invoice. No boundary issue, no exception applicable, no evidence gap. The no-anomaly conclusion stands.
